testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::bluetooth4/beacon_eddystone_url_hci0
testcase.failure:
==================================== Attempt 1/3 (function 'beacon_scan') ==================================== # Checking the LE Extended advertising capability Received response from controller. Raw 8-byte LE feature mask: 3f 0 0 8 0 0 0 0 # Extended advertising support: False # Checking the LE Extended advertising length HCI command failed with status 0x01. Failed to get the max_advertising_data_length from controller, return '255' # Max advertising data length: 255 # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Parameters by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'True' by hci command Warning: HCI Command failed. Error code: 0xc, Payload: b'\x04\x0e\x04\x01\x0c \x0c' # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command Attempt 1 failed: No EddyStone URL advertisement detected!
Waiting 5.43 seconds before retrying...
==================================== Attempt 2/3 (function 'beacon_scan') ==================================== # Checking the LE Extended advertising capability Received response from controller. Raw 8-byte LE feature mask: 3f 0 0 8 0 0 0 0 # Extended advertising support: False # Checking the LE Extended advertising length HCI command failed with status 0x01. Failed to get the max_advertising_data_length from controller, return '255' # Max advertising data length: 255 # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Parameters by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'True' by hci command Warning: HCI Command failed. Error code: 0xc, Payload: b'\x04\x0e\x04\x01\x0c \x0c' # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command Attempt 2 failed: No EddyStone URL advertisement detected!
Waiting 4.01 seconds before retrying...
==================================== Attempt 3/3 (function 'beacon_scan') ==================================== # Checking the LE Extended advertising capability Received response from controller. Raw 8-byte LE feature mask: 3f 0 0 8 0 0 0 0 # Extended advertising support: False # Checking the LE Extended advertising length HCI command failed with status 0x01. Failed to get the max_advertising_data_length from controller, return '255' # Max advertising data length: 255 # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Parameters by hci command # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'True' by hci command Warning: HCI Command failed. Error code: 0xc, Payload: b'\x04\x0e\x04\x01\x0c \x0c' # Issue LE Set Scan Enable to 'False' by hci command Attempt 3 failed: No EddyStone URL advertisement detected!
All the attempts have failed! Traceback (most recent call last): File "/snap/checkbox24/current/bin/checkbox-support-eddystone_scanner", line 8, in <module> sys.exit(main()) ^^^^^^ File "/snap/checkbox24/current/lib/python3.12/site-packages/checkbox_support/helpers/timeout.py", line 180, in _f return run_with_timeout(f, timeout_s, *args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/snap/checkbox24/current/lib/python3.12/site-packages/checkbox_support/helpers/timeout.py", line 155, in run_with_timeout raise exception_queue.get_nowait() RuntimeError: No EddyStone URL advertisement detected!

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::ethernet/ping-with-any-cable-interface
testcase.failure: Looking for all cable interfaces... FAIL: Couldn't find any suitable cable interface.

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::ethernet/ping_eth0
testcase.failure: ERROR:root:Could not find def gateway info in /proc Failed to find a host to ping on interface eth0 FAIL: Unable to ping any host with the above interfaces

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::ipv6_link_local_address_eth0
testcase.failure:
ip -6 -o addr show dev eth0 scope link
FAIL: No IPv6 address reported for the interface eth0

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::miscellanea/efi_boot_mode
testcase.failure: ERROR: FAIL: System did not boot in EFI mode

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::networking/predictable_names
testcase.failure: ** Error: Network interface eth0 is not a predictable name

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::watchdog/systemd-config
testcase.failure: systemd watchdog should be enabled but reset timeout (RuntimeWatchdogUSec) is set to: 0 In order for the watchdog service to work, the RuntimeWatchdogUSec configuration option must be set before running this test. found unexpected active watchdog.service unit

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::wireless/wireless_connection_open_ac_np_wlan0
testcase.failure:
Interface wlan0 using module brcmfmac Parameters: alternative_fw_path: debug: 0 roamoff: 0
Checking kernel ring buffer for brcmfmac messages: kern :debug : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: F1 signature read @0x18000000=0x15264345 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_fw_alloc_request: using brcm/brcmfmac43455-sdio for chip BCM4345/6 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] usbcore: registered new interface driver brcmfmac kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_process_txcap_blob: no txcap_blob available (err=-2) kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_preinit_dcmds: Firmware: BCM4345/6 wl0: Apr 15 2021 03:03:20 version 7.45.234 (4ca95bb CY) FWID 01-996384e2 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:04 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:51:13 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled
## Backup any existing netplan configuration files Clear backup location Backing up from /etc/netplan /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Delete any existing netplan configuration files /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Generate a test netplan configuration ## Delete the test file Test config /etc/netplan/99-CREATED-BY-CHECKBOX.yaml not found, ignoring...
## Restore configuration files Restoring: /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml + netplan --debug apply
A SSID is required for the test

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::wireless/wireless_connection_open_bg_np_wlan0
testcase.failure:
Interface wlan0 using module brcmfmac Parameters: alternative_fw_path: debug: 0 roamoff: 0
Checking kernel ring buffer for brcmfmac messages: kern :debug : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: F1 signature read @0x18000000=0x15264345 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_fw_alloc_request: using brcm/brcmfmac43455-sdio for chip BCM4345/6 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] usbcore: registered new interface driver brcmfmac kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_process_txcap_blob: no txcap_blob available (err=-2) kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_preinit_dcmds: Firmware: BCM4345/6 wl0: Apr 15 2021 03:03:20 version 7.45.234 (4ca95bb CY) FWID 01-996384e2 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:04 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:51:13 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled
## Backup any existing netplan configuration files Clear backup location Backing up from /etc/netplan /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Delete any existing netplan configuration files /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Generate a test netplan configuration ## Delete the test file Test config /etc/netplan/99-CREATED-BY-CHECKBOX.yaml not found, ignoring...
## Restore configuration files Restoring: /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml + netplan --debug apply
A SSID is required for the test

testcase.name: com.canonical.certification::wireless/wireless_connection_open_n_np_wlan0
testcase.failure:
Interface wlan0 using module brcmfmac Parameters: alternative_fw_path: debug: 0 roamoff: 0
Checking kernel ring buffer for brcmfmac messages: kern :debug : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: F1 signature read @0x18000000=0x15264345 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_fw_alloc_request: using brcm/brcmfmac43455-sdio for chip BCM4345/6 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] usbcore: registered new interface driver brcmfmac kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_process_txcap_blob: no txcap_blob available (err=-2) kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:03 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_c_preinit_dcmds: Firmware: BCM4345/6 wl0: Apr 15 2021 03:03:20 version 7.45.234 (4ca95bb CY) FWID 01-996384e2 kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:47:04 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled kern :info : [Sat Jun 27 04:51:13 2026] brcmfmac: brcmf_cfg80211_set_power_mgmt: power save enabled
## Backup any existing netplan configuration files Clear backup location Backing up from /etc/netplan /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Delete any existing netplan configuration files /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml
## Generate a test netplan configuration ## Delete the test file Test config /etc/netplan/99-CREATED-BY-CHECKBOX.yaml not found, ignoring...
## Restore configuration files Restoring: /etc/netplan/50-cloud-init.yaml + netplan --debug apply
A SSID is required for the test
